datapoints.datapoint: Module option selected (Basic Module only OR Basic + Comprehensive)
List of disclosures omitted as classified or sensitive information
datapoints.condition: Only if disclosures omitted
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Have you omitted any disclosures because they are classified or commercially sensitive?

datapoints.datapoint: Basis for reporting (consolidated or individual basis)
List of subsidiaries (with registered addresses) covered in consolidated reporting
datapoints.condition: Only if consolidated basis
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Are you reporting on a consolidated basis (i.e. covering subsidiaries)?

datapoints.datapoint: Undertaking's legal form
NACE sector classification code(s)
Size of the balance sheet
Turnover
Number of employees (headcount or full-time equivalents)
Country of primary operations and location of significant assets
Geolocation of sites owned, leased or managed (coordinates with 5 decimal places)
Brief description of sustainability-related certifications or labels (issuer, date, rating score)
datapoints.condition: Only if certifications/labels held
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking obtained any sustainability-related certifications or labels?

datapoints.disclosure: B2 — Practices, policies and future initiatives
datapoints.datapoint: Statement of practices, policies, future initiatives and targets across 10 sustainability sub-topics (see B2 Matrix tab)
datapoints.condition: Only if any such practices/policies/initiatives exist
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking put in place any specific practices, policies or future initiatives for transitioning towards a more sustainable economy?

datapoints.datapoint: Cooperative-specific information (worker/community participation in governance; investments in social economy entities; profit distribution limits)
datapoints.condition: Only if undertaking is a cooperative
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Is the undertaking a cooperative?

datapoints.datapoint: Total energy consumption
Electricity consumption — renewable
datapoints.condition: Only if breakdown obtainable
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Can the undertaking obtain the necessary information to provide an energy breakdown?

datapoints.datapoint: Electricity consumption — non-renewable
datapoints.condition: Only if breakdown obtainable
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Can the undertaking obtain the necessary information to provide an energy breakdown?

datapoints.datapoint: Fuels — renewable
datapoints.condition: Only if breakdown obtainable
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Can the undertaking obtain the necessary information to provide an energy breakdown?

datapoints.datapoint: Fuels — non-renewable
datapoints.condition: Only if breakdown obtainable
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Can the undertaking obtain the necessary information to provide an energy breakdown?

datapoints.datapoint: Gross Scope 1 GHG emissions (from owned or controlled sources)
Gross Scope 2 GHG emissions (location-based)

datapoints.disclosure: B3 — GHG emission intensity per turnover
datapoints.datapoint: GHG emission intensity (Scope 1 + Scope 2 / turnover)

datapoints.disclosure: B4 — Pollution of air, water and soil
datapoints.datapoint: Pollutants emitted to air, water and soil with amount per pollutant (or reference to existing public document)
datapoints.condition: Only if already reporting under law or Environmental Management System
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Is the undertaking required by law (or under an Environmental Management System) to report pollutant emissions to competent authorities?

datapoints.datapoint: Number and area of sites in or near biodiversity-sensitive areas
Total water withdrawal
Water withdrawal at sites in areas of high water-stress
Water consumption (withdrawal minus discharge) from production processes
datapoints.condition: Only if undertaking has water-intensive production processes
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have production processes which significantly consume water (e.g. drying, power production, agricultural irrigation)?

datapoints.datapoint: Whether the undertaking applies circular economy principles, and if so, how
Total annual generation of non-hazardous waste
Total annual generation of hazardous waste (including radioactive)
Total annual waste diverted to recycling or reuse

datapoints.disclosure: B7 — Annual mass-flow of relevant materials
datapoints.datapoint: Annual mass-flow of relevant materials used
datapoints.condition: Only if in sectors with significant material flows (manufacturing, construction, packaging)
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking operate in a sector using significant material flows (e.g. manufacturing, construction, packaging)?

datapoints.datapoint: Number of employees on permanent contracts
Number of employees on temporary contracts
Number of employees — Male
Number of employees — Female
Number of employees — Other
Number of employees — Not reported
Number of employees by country of employment contract
datapoints.condition: Only if undertaking operates in more than one country
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking operate in more than one country?

datapoints.datapoint: Employee turnover rate for the reporting period
datapoints.condition: Only if ≥50 employees
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking employ 50 or more employees?

datapoints.datapoint: Number of recordable work-related accidents
Rate of recordable work-related accidents (per 200,000 hours worked)
Number of fatalities resulting from work-related injuries and work-related ill-health
Whether employees receive pay equal to or above applicable minimum wage
Percentage gender pay gap (gross hourly pay)
datapoints.condition: Only if ≥150 employees (≥100 from 7 June 2031)
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking employ 150 or more employees? (Threshold drops to 100 from 7 June 2031.)

datapoints.datapoint: Percentage of employees covered by collective bargaining agreements
Average annual training hours per employee — Male
Average annual training hours per employee — Female

datapoints.disclosure: B11 — Convictions and fines for corruption and bribery
datapoints.datapoint: Number of convictions for violation of anti-corruption and anti-bribery laws
datapoints.condition: Only if convictions occurred in the reporting period
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking incurred any convictions for violation of anti-corruption and anti-bribery laws in the reporting period?

datapoints.disclosure: B11 — Convictions and fines for corruption and bribery
datapoints.datapoint: Total amount of fines for violation of anti-corruption and anti-bribery laws
datapoints.condition: Only if fines incurred in the reporting period
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking incurred any fines for violation of anti-corruption and anti-bribery laws in the reporting period?

datapoints.disclosure: C1 — Strategy: Business Model and Sustainability-Related Initiatives
datapoints.datapoint: Description of significant groups of products/services offered

datapoints.disclosure: C1 — Strategy: Business Model and Sustainability-Related Initiatives
datapoints.datapoint: Description of significant markets (B2B, wholesale, retail, countries)

datapoints.disclosure: C1 — Strategy: Business Model and Sustainability-Related Initiatives
datapoints.datapoint: Description of main business relationships (key suppliers, customers, distribution channels, consumers — including estimated number of suppliers and their sectors/geographies)

datapoints.disclosure: C1 — Strategy: Business Model and Sustainability-Related Initiatives
datapoints.datapoint: Brief description of key strategy elements that relate to or affect sustainability issues
datapoints.condition: Only if strategy has elements related to sustainability
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking's strategy have key elements that relate to or affect sustainability issues?

datapoints.disclosure: C2 — Practices, policies and future initiatives (extended)
datapoints.datapoint: Brief description of practices/policies/future initiatives previously reported under B2 + accountable senior level (matrix per paragraph 213)
datapoints.condition: Only if YES answers under B2
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Did the undertaking answer YES to any practices, policies or future initiatives under B2?

datapoints.datapoint: Whether the undertaking has established GHG emission reduction targets
Target year and target year value (Scope 1 and Scope 2; Scope 3 if set)
datapoints.condition: Only if GHG targets established
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking established GHG emission reduction targets?

datapoints.datapoint: Base year and base year value
datapoints.condition: Only if GHG targets established
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking established GHG emission reduction targets?

datapoints.datapoint: Units used for targets
datapoints.condition: Only if GHG targets established
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking established GHG emission reduction targets?

datapoints.datapoint: Share of Scope 1, Scope 2 and (if disclosed) Scope 3 covered by the target
datapoints.condition: Only if GHG targets established
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking established GHG emission reduction targets?

datapoints.datapoint: List of main actions to be implemented to achieve targets
datapoints.condition: Only if GHG targets established
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking established GHG emission reduction targets?

datapoints.datapoint: Whether and when the undertaking will adopt a transition plan
datapoints.condition: Only if undertaking operates in high climate impact sector AND does NOT have a transition plan in place
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking operate in a high climate impact sector (NACE Sections A–H or L) and not currently have a transition plan?

datapoints.datapoint: Brief description of identified climate-related hazards and climate-related transition events
datapoints.condition: Only if climate-related hazards/transition events have been identified
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking identified climate-related hazards and climate-related transition events that create gross climate-related risks?

datapoints.datapoint: How the exposure and sensitivity of assets, activities and value chain to these hazards/transition events has been assessed
datapoints.condition: Only if climate-related hazards/transition events have been identified
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking identified climate-related hazards and climate-related transition events that create gross climate-related risks?

datapoints.datapoint: Time horizons of climate-related hazards and transition events identified
datapoints.condition: Only if climate-related hazards/transition events have been identified
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking identified climate-related hazards and climate-related transition events that create gross climate-related risks?

datapoints.datapoint: Whether climate change adaptation actions have been undertaken
datapoints.condition: Only if climate-related hazards/transition events have been identified
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Has the undertaking identified climate-related hazards and climate-related transition events that create gross climate-related risks?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: Does the undertaking have a code of conduct or human rights policy for its own workforce?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: If yes, does the policy cover child labour?
datapoints.condition: Only if 61(a) = yes
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have a code of conduct or human rights policy?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: If yes, does the policy cover forced labour?
datapoints.condition: Only if 61(a) = yes
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have a code of conduct or human rights policy?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: If yes, does the policy cover human trafficking?
datapoints.condition: Only if 61(a) = yes
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have a code of conduct or human rights policy?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: If yes, does the policy cover discrimination?
datapoints.condition: Only if 61(a) = yes
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have a code of conduct or human rights policy?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: If yes, does the policy cover accident prevention?
datapoints.condition: Only if 61(a) = yes
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have a code of conduct or human rights policy?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: If yes, does the policy cover other matters? (specify)
datapoints.condition: Only if 61(a) = yes
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have a code of conduct or human rights policy?

datapoints.disclosure: C6 — Human rights policies and processes
datapoints.datapoint: Does the undertaking have a complaints-handling mechanism for its own workforce?

datapoints.disclosure: C7 — Severe negative human rights incidents
datapoints.datapoint: Confirmed incidents in own workforce — child labour

datapoints.disclosure: C7 — Severe negative human rights incidents
datapoints.datapoint: Confirmed incidents in own workforce — forced labour

datapoints.disclosure: C7 — Severe negative human rights incidents
datapoints.datapoint: Confirmed incidents in own workforce — human trafficking

datapoints.disclosure: C7 — Severe negative human rights incidents
datapoints.datapoint: Confirmed incidents in own workforce — discrimination

datapoints.disclosure: C7 — Severe negative human rights incidents
datapoints.datapoint: Confirmed incidents in own workforce — other (specify)

datapoints.disclosure: C7 — Severe negative human rights incidents
datapoints.datapoint: Awareness of confirmed incidents involving workers in value chain, affected communities, consumers and end-users (specify)
Revenue derived from controversial weapons (anti-personnel mines, cluster munitions, chemical weapons, biological weapons)
datapoints.condition: Only if active in this sector
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking derive revenue from controversial weapons (anti-personnel mines, cluster munitions, chemical or biological weapons)?

datapoints.datapoint: Revenue derived from cultivation and production of tobacco
datapoints.condition: Only if active in this sector
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking derive revenue from the cultivation or production of tobacco?

datapoints.datapoint: Revenue derived from coal
datapoints.condition: Only if active in fossil fuel sector
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking derive revenue from the fossil fuel sector (coal, oil or gas)?

datapoints.datapoint: Revenue derived from oil
datapoints.condition: Only if active in fossil fuel sector
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking derive revenue from the fossil fuel sector (coal, oil or gas)?

datapoints.datapoint: Revenue derived from gas
datapoints.condition: Only if active in fossil fuel sector
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking derive revenue from the fossil fuel sector (coal, oil or gas)?

datapoints.datapoint: Revenue derived from chemicals production (pesticides and other agrochemical products)
datapoints.condition: Only if active in this sector
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking manufacture pesticides or other agrochemical products?

datapoints.disclosure: C8 — Exclusion from EU reference benchmarks
datapoints.datapoint: Whether excluded from EU Paris-aligned Benchmarks: ≥1% revenue from coal/lignite (exploration, mining, extraction, distribution, refining)

datapoints.disclosure: C8 — Exclusion from EU reference benchmarks
datapoints.datapoint: Whether excluded from EU Paris-aligned Benchmarks: ≥10% revenue from oil fuels (exploration, extraction, distribution, refining)

datapoints.disclosure: C8 — Exclusion from EU reference benchmarks
datapoints.datapoint: Whether excluded from EU Paris-aligned Benchmarks: ≥50% revenue from gaseous fuels (exploration, extraction, manufacturing, distribution)

datapoints.disclosure: C8 — Exclusion from EU reference benchmarks
datapoints.datapoint: Whether excluded from EU Paris-aligned Benchmarks: ≥50% revenue from electricity generation with GHG intensity >100g CO2e/kWh

datapoints.disclosure: C9 — Gender diversity ratio in governance body
datapoints.datapoint: Gender diversity ratio in the governance body (female-to-male)
datapoints.condition: Only if undertaking has a governance body in place
datapoints.triggeringQuestion: Does the undertaking have a governance body in place?

optionalDatapoints.condition: Standard says 'may also want to provide'

optionalDatapoints.datapoint: Information about the transition plan for climate change mitigation (incl. how it contributes to GHG reduction)
optionalDatapoints.condition: If undertaking operates in high climate impact sector AND has a transition plan; standard says 'may provide'

optionalDatapoints.datapoint: Potential adverse effects of climate risks on financial performance/business operations (high/medium/low) over short/medium/long term

optionalDatapoints.condition: Only if ≥50 employees; standard says 'may disclose'

optionalDatapoints.datapoint: Number of self-employed without personnel working exclusively for undertaking, and temporary workers from employment-activity providers
optionalDatapoints.condition: Only if ≥50 employees; standard says 'may disclose'

optionalDatapoints.disclosure: C7 — Severe negative human rights incidents
optionalDatapoints.datapoint: Description of actions being taken to address confirmed incidents
optionalDatapoints.condition: Only if any incident in 62(a) = yes; standard says 'may describe'
